description_long: This is a modern apartment complex consisting of four tall, rectangular towers arranged symmetrically around a central courtyard. The towers feature numerous evenly spaced balconies and windows, giving the facade a highly regular and geometric appearance. The central courtyard area includes landscaped paths, a swimming pool, and recreational spaces, all surrounded by the buildings. The base of the complex is set on a green lawn with paved walkways and a road bordering one side. The exterior is predominantly white, with blue and gray accents visible along the road and pool areas. The overall design is clean, functional, and optimized for high-density urban living.
description: A modern, white apartment complex with four tall towers, balconies, and a landscaped central courtyard featuring a pool and walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four towers with balconies, a green lawn, and a road on the left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the central courtyard with a pool, recreational areas, and the symmetrical arrangement of the towers.
description_view_2: Opposite front view highlighting the main entrance, road access, and the uniform facade of the towers.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the courtyard, pool, and a large green area behind the complex.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a highly regular, grid-like pattern with even vertical and horizontal spacing, creating a symmetrical and uniform appearance across all towers.
